_source: FDIC BankFind Suite REST API (banks.data.fdic.gov). 2024-Q2 snapshot (REPDTE=20240630).
_plan_ref: eval_holdout_v2/PER_SOURCE_PREPROCESSOR_PLAN.md — wave-6 finance bucket. Six-entity decomposition of the BankFind /institutions, /locations, /financials endpoints into Bank, Branch, CallReport, FinancialMetric, State, BankClass.
_notes: CERT is the FDIC certificate number and the canonical join key across all three source tables. Rendered as string for URI stability.

FinancialMetric is the fanout entity: one row per (CERT, REPDTE, metric_code) tuple. The spec ships 19 hand-picked regulatory ratios — Cost of Funds was OMITTED because FDIC BankFind does not publish a precomputed cost-of-funds field and the per-item MDRM denominator (interest-bearing liabilities) is not cleanly resolvable from the BankFind payload (total-liab LIAB is a superset, and INTEXPY is a yield-on-earning-assets figure, not a cost-of-funds ratio). Omission is the approved fallback per the schema override 'verification' block.

Three verified field codes from the schema override turned out to NOT be present in the live 2024-Q2 BankFind /financials payload, so the preprocessor substitutes the closest documented BankFind alias: (1) Tier 1 Risk-Based Cap Ratio RBC1RWAJ -> IDT1RWAJR (same definition, 'Tier 1 Risk-Based Capital Ratio - Adjusted'), (2) CET1 Ratio RBCT1CER -> IDT1CER (explicitly called out in the schema override as the duplicate alias), (3) NCO-to-Avg-Loans ELNATRR -> ELNATRY (annualized net charge-offs to average loans).
LTD_RATIO (Net Loans & Leases to Assets) is computed client-side as LNLSNET/ASSET*100 because LNLSNETR is also absent from the payload. Both source fields ARE present, so the derivation is exact.

Branch entity was DROPPED from the ingested schema in wave-6 to (a) reduce triple volume to fit the shared /update rate budget while 5 holdout-v2 ingests ran concurrently, and (b) preemptively remove the Bank->Branch->Location->State shape that the wave-5 plan flagged as uncomfortably adjacent to the v9-training cfpb-bank-accounts KG. The raw Branch.csv is staged on disk for future re-ingest if the adjacency gate permits it. Branch removal reduces the ingested triple count by roughly 1.1M and reframes FDIC as Bank -> CallReport -> FinancialMetric, a filing-centric shape distinct from cfpb's account-centric shape.
State entity is derived from institutions.STALP; a State row is emitted per unique two-letter code appearing in Bank or Branch.
BankClass codes: N, SM, NM, SB, SA, OI. Description + regulator + charter category lifted from the schema override.
